problem id: 3a6a8eb9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  10110100 -> 10000000
  01111011 -> 01000001
  00011110 -> 11000000
  00000011 -> 00000000
  10101010 -> 01000000
  10100100 -> 00000000
  11011100 -> 10000010
  00101110 -> 01000000

query: 10111011
predicted answer: 01000000
